title: Debugger
subtitle: Contains methods related to the IoVM debugger.

members.name: debuggerCoroutine
members.description: Returns the coroutine used for the debugger.

members.name: description
members.description: To start debugging a coroutine, call Coroutine currentCoroutine setMessageDebugging(true) Then each message sent within that coroutine will cause the Debugger vmWillSendMessage slot to be activated and the Debugger slots: messageCoroutine, messageSelf, messageLocals, and message will be set with the values related to the current message send. You can override vmWillSendMessage to implement your own debugging mechanisms.

members.name: vmWillSendMessage
members.description: Override this method to implement your own debugging mechanisms. Default behavior is to print every message sent.
